_publications._publicationTitle: Autism Spectrum Disorder Symptom Profile Across the RASopathies.

_contextSnippet: Domain C: Mean Restricted, Repetitive, and Stereotyped Patterns of Behavior (95% CI) 5.8 (5.7–5.9) 4.7(4.1–5.3) 5.6 (5.5–5.7) 0.649
details: Mean Domain C (Restricted, Repetitive Behaviors) scores were 5.8 (95% CI: 5.7-5.9) in NF1+ASD, 4.7 (95% CI: 4.1-5.3) in NS+ASD, and 5.6 (95% CI: 5.5-5.7) in CFC+ASD (p=0.649)
